headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，新片寥寥
headlineEn: Obsession Leads Trending as Few New Films Debut
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，但《痴迷》与《福尔摩斯小姐3》持续霸榜；本周《超级少女》《穿普拉达的女王2》等备受期待。
summaryEn: Entertainment digest: Zero new releases today, but Obsession and Enola Holmes 3 dominate; Supergirl, The Devil Wears Prada 2 among top weekly buzz.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片仅1部，市场冷清
industryHighlights.en: Only 1 new film this week; slow market

industryHighlights.text: 《权力的游戏前传：龙族》持续热榜
industryHighlights.en: House of the Dragon remains in weekly top trends

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大片即将来袭
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: Fresh New Day and others upcoming
